title: The Valley of Decision
writer: John Meehan, Sonya Levien, Marcia Davenport
actors: Greer Garson, Gregory Peck, Donald Crisp
plot: An Irish maid falls for the son of her wealthy boss, though their disapproving fathers and a bitter strike at the steel mill complicate matters.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 1 win & 2 nominations total
